base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of knight_axe_variants — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Armored knight with battle-axe — 3 palette variants (blue/purple/red). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Armored knight with battle-axe — 3 palette variants (blue/purple/red); high-damage melee
